subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is Thy servant, who is attracted to Thy Most Glorious Beauty, his heart enkindled with the fire of Thy love amidst the concourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک المنجذب الی جمالک الابهی المتوقد القلب بنار محبتک بین الملا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pioneers and travel teachers, @review of publications, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement
